description: Professional profile summary. Singleton record providing professional identity beyond the base ATproto profile. Does not duplicate displayName, avatar, or bio from app.bsky.actor.profile.

headline.description: Professional headline (e.g., 'Senior Engineer at Acme Corp'). Distinct from Bluesky's displayName.

about.description: Professional summary or about section. Longer-form than Bluesky's description field.

location.description: Professional location (city, region, country). Uses community location lexicon.

website.description: Professional website URL. Distinct from Bluesky profile website if needed.

openTo.description: Types of opportunities the user is open to. Empty array or omitted means not actively seeking.

preferredWorkplace.description: Preferred workplace arrangements. Orthogonal to openTo. Empty array or omitted means no preference.

langs.description: BCP 47 language tags indicating the user's primary professional languages.

labels.description: Self-label values for the professional profile.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this profile was originally created.
